How To Buy Binance Dog

–

Create Wallet

Ensure you have a compatible wallet, like MetaMask or Trust Wallet, set up and connected to the BSC chain.

Transfer some BNB or another compatible token to your wallet to use for the trade.

Buy Binance Dog

Go to Pancakeswap and navigate to the swap page.

Select the Binance Dog token to swap from and enter contract address 

Choose Amount to Buy

Enter the amount of BNB or Binancedog tokens you want to buy, ensuring you have enough BNB to cover transaction fees.

Confirm the transaction and follow the prompts to complete the swap.

Hold Binance Dog

Now you’re all set! Welcome aboard the next rocket to the moon, just import the contract address to view you’re holdings and you can track your earnings.
